§6Pyrolysis Oven§f breaks down organic materials through high-temperature decomposition.

§eFunction:§f
• Thermal decomposition without oxygen
• Produces char, oils, and gases
• Chemical feedstock production

§eProducts:§f
• Coal → Coke + Coal Gas
• Organic materials → Char + Oils

§aTip:§f Essential for certain chemical production chains.
